description: Freshman in fall semester, just starting to think about college. One state-school target on the list.
business_rationale: Confirms that brand-new users — 9th graders just starting their college journey — get a useful, age-appropriate roadmap right away. This is the first impression for our youngest cohort and a common drop-off point if the dashboard feels empty or irrelevant.
tests: Resolver picks freshman_fall from graduation_year=2030 + fall
Roadmap is non-empty even for a brand-new freshman with minimal context
